titleStmt.title: SII 17.326: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 326. (A.R. No. 297 of 1904.) KĀḶAHASTI, KALAHASTI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north, east and south bases of the central shrine in the Kāḷahastīśvara temple.

This registers an endowment of 35 kaḻañju of gold yielding an interest of 5-1/4 kaḻañju per annum at 2 mā per month per kaḻañju for feeding two śivayōgins every day and another endowment of 40 cows for a midday lamp and pañcha-gavya for the sacred bath of the deity in the temple and a third endowment of land for a nandavanam named after the donor to the temple by Daṇḍanāyakaṉ Sōmaṉ Kumaraṉ alias Madurāntaka-mārāyaṉ. The endowed amount was entrusted into the hands of some merchants of Śōḻapuram in Āṟṟūr-nāḍu and the cows were made over to Māṟaṉ Maṉagati of Puliyam in Ūṟṟukkāṭṭu-kōṭṭam.
Further the record states that the maṇḍapa in front of the temple built by the donor was named Madhurānataka-mārāyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum poṟcayappāvaiyuñ cirttanicelviyum taṉperun=teviyarāki Inpuṟa neṭutiyalūḻiyuḷ ḷiṭaituṟaiynāṭun tuṭarvaṟa velippaṭar vaṉavāciyum cuḷḷic cūḻmatiṭ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟ karumaraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭaliḻat taraicartamuṭiyu māṅkavarteviya roṅkeḻil muṭiyu muṉṉavar pakkaṟ ṟeṉṉavaṉ vaiytta cuntaramuṭiyum Intira nāramun teṇṭicai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatu meṟipaṭaikkeraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅkulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyuñ ceṅkatir mālaiyuñ caṅkatir velaittol peruṅkāval palpaḻantivum ceruviṟ ciṉavilirupattorukā laraicukaḷaikaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ mevaruñ cāntimaṟṟivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅka naḷapperumpukaḻoṭum piṭiyiliraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum navanetikkulap perumalaikaḷum vikkiramavirar cakkarakkoṭṭamum mutirpaṭavallai maturamaṇṭalamum kāmiṭaivaḷa nāmaṇaikkoṇaiyum veñcilaivirā pañcappaḷḷiyum ṇi tecamum Ayarvilvaṇkirtti Ātinakaravaiyiṟ cantiraṉ ṟolkulat tin=tira rataṉai viḷaiyamarkkaḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭum pi
ṭittu palataṉattoṭu niṟaikulatanakkuvaiyuṅ kiṭṭaruñceṟumiḷai Oṭṭaviṣaiyamum pūcurar ceynal kocalaināṭum tanmapālaṉai vemmuṉaiyaḻittu vaṇṭuṟai colait taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇukat tākkit tikkaṇai kirttit takkaṇalāṭamum kovintacantan māviḻintoṭa taṅkāta cāral vaṅkāḷa tecamum toṭukaṭaṟ caṅkoṭṭa l mahipālaṉai veñcamar viḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittila neṭuṅkaṭal luttiralāṭamum veṟimalar tirttat teṟipuṉaṟ kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuvuṭ palakalañ celuttic caṅkirāma vicaiyoṟttuṅka panmanākiya kiṭārattaraiyanai vākaiyam porukaṭal kumpakkariyoṭu makappaṭut turimaiyiṟp piṟakkiya perunetipiṟakkamum Ārttavanakanakarp porttoḻil vācalil viccātira toraṇamum moyt toḻil puṉamaṇip putavamum kanamaṇikkatavamum niṟai śrīvijayamum tuṟai nirp paṉṉaiyum vaṉamalaiyūreyiṟ ṟoṉmalai Ūrum Āḻkaṭalakaḻcūḻ māyiruṭiṅkamum kalaṅkāval viṉai Ilaṅkācokamum kāppuṟu niṟaipuṉal māpappāḷamuṅ kāval puricai mevili paṅkamum viḷaippantūṟuṭai va
ḷaippa(y)ntūṟum kalaittakkorpukaḻ talaittakkolamun titamāvalviṉai mātamaliṅkamum kalāmuri kaṭuntiṟa lilāmuri tecamun teṉakkalarppoḻil māpporu taṇṭāṟkoṇṭa kopparakecaripanmarāna śrīrājentracoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 3 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu perumpāṇappāṭi Āṟṟūr nāṭ
ṭu coḻapurattukkuc camainta viyāpārikaḷ cevūr maṇinākanāna kiṭāraṅkoṇṭacoḻa ceṭṭiyum tevan kāriyān Uttamacoḻacceṭṭiyum tāḻi cūṟṟiyāna karikālacoḻa māyilaṭṭiyum naṭaiyāṭi panaṅkāṭanāna tevarkaḷ coti māyilaṭṭiyum nampaṉ caṅkaraṉum kūttan tirukkā ḷattiyum tūkkan cūṟṟiyāna cāḷokkiyacakkaravartticceṭṭiyum cittaman tirukkāḷattiyāna kariya māṇikka ceṭṭiyum pottan kaliyanāna rājen=tiracoḻacceṭṭiyum Uḷḷiṭṭa nakarattom kaittiṭṭu . tirukkāḷatti mahāde nāḷ nāliṉāl yum pūcamum peṟṟa viyāḻakkiḻamai nāṉṟu nāṅkaḷ koṇṭu kaṭava poṉ muppattaiṅkaḻañcu Ippoṉ muppattaiṅkaḻañcum koṇ ṭom koṇṭa pari
ḷ vāyt tiṅkaḷiraṇṭumāppoṉ palicaiyāka Eṟṟi yāṇṭuvarai poli caiyāka van=ta poṉ Aiyṅkaḻañceykāl Ippoṉ Aiṅkaḻañceykāluṅ koṇṭu nāṅkaḷ celuttakkaṭava nivan=tamāvatu nittam Iruvar śivacokikaḷukku kuttal Arici Arumoḻite vaṉāl nicata Arici nāṉāḻiyum kaṟiku moṉṟum poṟikkaṟi Oṉṟum Ilaikkaṟi Oṉṟum Ākak kaṟi muṉṟum Iccoṟṟukkum kaṟikkum veṇṭum Uppum nicatam ney mucceviṭum perā luriymorum Ilaikkum Aṭaveṇṭu pāṉaiyum caṭṭiyum viṟakum A ṭṭuvaruvāṉoruvanukku nicatam nāḻinellum Uṇṭa śivaco veṟṟilai nālum Āka Iruvarkkum Orunāḷaikkup pākku nālum veṟṟilai Eṭṭum tirukkāḷatti Uṭaiya mahadevar mattyānattut tiruvamutu ceytaruḷap parikalameṟi Aruḷiḻavāṟey Ū
kāḷattiuṭaiya mahādevar tirumuṟṟattey nittanivantam celuttak kaṭavomākavum Ipparicu Innivantam nakarattu muṉpu naṉ mey cantirātittaval niṟkac celuttakkaṭavomākavum Ikkaittiṭṭinpaṭi cempilum kallilum sa(h)āsanam ceytukoḷḷappeṟuvārkaḷākavum nivantam tirukkāḷattimahādevaruṭaiya Ādidāsaśa ṇṭeśvararkku Orukālāvatum Irukālāvatu mukkālāvatum nāṅkaḷ Oṭṭukkuṭutta kaittiṭṭiṉpaṭi cantirātittaval niṟkac celuttakkaṭavomāṉom tirukkāḷattiyāṉa mummuṭicoḻapurattu nakarattom ..yāṇṭu 2 10 3 Āvatuḷa 4 10 5 nāl taṇṭanāyaṉ comaṉ kumaraṉāṉa maturāntakamārāyaṉ It tevarkku pañ
vāp perum pacu nāṟpatu Ippacu nāṟpatuṅkoṇṭu Ucciyampotu santi viḷakku ney Uḻakkum pāl nāḻi Uḻakkum tayir nāḻi Uḻakkum komuttiramum komaya mum Āṭi Aruḷi ceyvataṟkku Ippacu nāṟpatuṅ kaikkoṇṭu Itdevarkku In nivantam cantrātittavaṟ celuttuvenāṉeṉ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu Ūṟṟuk kāṭṭu koṭṭattu puliyattu maṉṟāṭi māṟaṉ maṉakati malai maṉṟāṭi ceyvitta tirunantavāṉam Āvatu tirumukalikku meṟkum Uṭaiyār tiruviḻā Eḻun=taruḷum peruvaḻikkuk kiḻakkum naṭu
kkuṟaiyiṟ comaṉ kumaranāṉa taṇṭanāyakaṉ maturā n=taka mārāyaṉ tirukkāḷatti Uṭaiyārkku maramuṅ kamukum māvum pilāvum teṅkum maṟṟum palavaṟkkattu maraṅkaḷum vaittu ceytu kuṭuttāṉ taṇṭanāyakaṉ comaṉ kumaraṉ Āṉa maturān=takamārāyaṉ Ittirunan=tāvaṉantukkup per śrī maturā nnakamārāyaṉ Eṉpatu It tirunan=tāvanamum muṭṭātu tiruvamutu ceytaruḷum poḻutu Iruvar civacokikaḷ Uṇṇavum Uṭaiyārkku pancakavya(ya)m Āṭiyaruḷavum
yārkku taṇṭanāyakaṉ maturān=takamārāyaṉ Eṭuppitta koyilil muṉpil periya tirumaṇṭapattukkup per maturān=takamārāyaṉ Ittanmam can=tirātitta varaiyum niṟka ceytu cilālekaiy ceytār coḻamaṇṭalattu Arumoḻiteva nāṭṭu kiṭāraṅkoṇṭa coḻanallūr comaṉ kumara
meṟpaṭi Ūr nakarattukkuc camainta viyāpārikaḷil tevan kāriyāna Uttama coḻac ceṭṭiyum pottan kaliyanāna rājen=tiracoḻac ceṭṭiyum paṇṭitan poṟkāḷiyāna nittavinota ceṭṭiyum tukkañ cūṟṟiyāna cāḷokkiya cakkaravattic ceṭṭiyum cevūr maṇi
Digital edition of SII 17.326 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
